title: crotalaria madurensis var. kurnoolica
intro: Crotalaria madurensis var. kurnoolica, also known as the Kurnool rattle pod, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria madurensis var. kurnoolica include potential uses in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or paste, and its seeds are sometimes used to make herbal remedies.
